question: image-inferred candidate vent positions and shapes
allowed_p1_treatment: use dual-view candidate with stored uncertainty
prohibited_claim: image candidate is exact production geometry
required_new_evidence: new orthographic image or physical measurement

question: true intake group count and mapping to cells
allowed_p1_treatment: retain drawn-object names and branch the distribution volume
prohibited_claim: vent count equals group count or cell count

question: exact exhaust manifold 3D geometry
allowed_p1_treatment: retain at least two documented C branches
prohibited_claim: a selected candidate is production geometry

question: spout cross-section length wall thickness and exact position
allowed_p1_treatment: use qualitative single-side topology plus explicit C branch

question: separate side-frame identity and wall section
prohibited_claim: a proxy is an identified product part

question: flex keep-out polygon thickness and material
allowed_p1_treatment: reference keep-out only; no solver export
prohibited_claim: flex shape or mass is known
required_new_evidence: measured pixels with scale or teardown

question: shared grouped or independent top chambers
prohibited_claim: one sharing mode is the production structure
required_new_evidence: internal imaging or stronger patent-product mapping

question: P008 separation s center-versus-edge definition
allowed_p1_treatment: retain center-pitch and edge-gap interpretation sentinels
prohibited_claim: P008 is silently a center pitch
required_new_evidence: unambiguous figure interpretation or new source

question: production hole shape and cone angle
allowed_p1_treatment: use circular cylinder R0 and retain conical deferred branch

question: physical decomposition and location of residual thickness
prohibited_claim: residual reference bodies are physical layers

question: size-specific actuator thickness and layer stack
allowed_p1_treatment: P002 cross-size placeholder only; branch before P2
prohibited_claim: all membrane sizes use the 8 mm patent thickness

question: actual active plate polygon and hole count
allowed_p1_treatment: recount after CAD Boolean and report actual porosity
prohibited_claim: proxy hole count is production count

question: materials densities and complete mass allocation
allowed_p1_treatment: export volumes and unresolved mass separately
prohibited_claim: candidate geometry closes exactly to 11 g
required_new_evidence: material evidence or measured component masses

question: external fillets chamfers and manufacturing details
allowed_p1_treatment: suppress in R0 unless required for topology
prohibited_claim: marketing render edge treatment is dimensioned

question: external plenum and test-domain extent
allowed_p1_treatment: defer final domain to P4 and label numerical
prohibited_claim: external domain is a product component
